data.current_description: Upload a new version of an existing plugin to the JetBrains Marketplace. Identify the plugin using either its numeric pluginId or its XML-based identifier (xmlId).
data.description_suggestion: Upload a new version of an existing plugin to the JetBrains Marketplace. Identify the plugin using either its numeric pluginId or its XML-based identifier (xmlId). Requires bearer token authentication. Returns upload confirmation with plugin metadata. The new version becomes available for download after processing.
data.reasoning: Description lacks information about authentication requirements, response content, and side effects (version availability). Added these details to help AI agents understand the complete operation flow and what to expect after execution.

message: Operation 'downloadLatestCompatiblePlugin' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is vague about required parameters and response behavior. Added clarity about what parameters are needed and what happens when no compatible version is found, improving AI agent decision-making about parameter requirements and error handling.

data.current_description: Retrieves the most recent plugin version compatible with a specified IDE product and build number.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the most recent plugin version compatible with a specified IDE product and build number. Requires IDE product identifier and build number as parameters. Returns the plugin binary file for download. Returns empty result if no compatible version exists for the specified IDE build.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about required parameters and response behavior. Added clarity about what parameters are needed and what happens when no compatible version is found, improving AI agent decision-making about parameter requirements and error handling.

message: Operation 'downloadPluginByVersion' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks specificity about required parameters and response format. data.current_description: Downloads a designated plugin version regardless of IDE compatibility.
data.description_suggestion: Downloads a designated plugin version regardless of IDE compatibility. Requires plugin identifier and version number as parameters. Returns the plugin binary file for download. Note: This operation bypasses compatibility checks; ensure the version is appropriate for your IDE.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about required parameters and response format. Added parameter requirements and clarified that this operation skips compatibility validation, helping AI agents understand when to use this versus the compatibility-aware download operation.
